title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Royce-Royce & Co Ltd
body: "Application number 5180  Applicant Rolls-Royce Plc objected to the name used by Royce-Royce & Co Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 28 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Royce-Royce & Co Ltd is changed to 15939417, Ltd. "
